$playlistId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['id', 'ownerId', 'ownerUid', 'name', 'source', 'songCount', 'songs']) && newData.child('ownerId').val() === $uid && newData.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 80 && newData.child('source').isString() && newData.child('songCount').isNumber() && newData.child('songCount').val() >= 0 && newData.child('songCount').val() <= 1000

$songId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['title', 'artist', 'year']) && newData.child('title').isString() && newData.child('artist').isString() && newData.child('year').isNumber() && newData.child('year').val() >= 1900 && newData.child('year').val() <= 2100

$roomId..write: auth != null && !newData.exists() && data.child('meta/status').val() === 'closed' && (data.child('meta/hostUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('memberUids/' + auth.uid).val() === true)

meta..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('hostId').isString() && newData.child('hostId').val().length > 0 && newData.child('status').val() === 'lobby' && newData.child('code').val() === $roomId && newData.child('updatedByUid').val() === auth.uid) || (data.exists() && newData.child('hostUid').val() === data.child('hostUid').val() && ((data.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid) || (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/memberUids/' + auth.uid).val() === true && newData.child('status').val() === 'closed' && newData.child('closeReason').val().matches(/^(empty|timeout)$/)))))

$playerId..write: auth != null && ((!newData.exists() && (data.child('uid').val() === auth.uid || root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/meta/hostUid').val() === auth.uid)) || (newData.exists() && newData.child('id').val() === $playerId && newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/meta/status').val() !== 'closed'))
$playerId..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['id', 'uid', 'name', 'online', 'lastSeen']) && newData.child('id').val() === $playerId && newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 32 && newData.child('online').isBoolean())

$entryId..write: auth != null && (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/meta/hostUid').val() === auth.uid || (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/meta/status').val() === 'lobby' && ((!newData.exists() && (data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('createdByUid').val() === auth.uid)) || (newData.exists() && (newData.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid || newData.child('createdByUid').val() === auth.uid)))))
$entryId..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['id', 'ownerId', 'ownerUid', 'playerId', 'playerName', 'name', 'songCount', 'songs']) && newData.child('ownerUid').isString() && newData.child('playerId').isString() && newData.child('playerName').isString() && newData.child('playerName').val().length <= 32 && newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 80 && newData.child('songCount').isNumber() && newData.child('songCount').val() >= 0 && newData.child('songCount').val() <= 1000)

selectedPlaylistId..write: auth != null && (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/meta/hostUid').val() === auth.uid || (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/meta/status').val() === 'lobby' && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/memberUids/' + auth.uid).val() === true))

selectedPlaylist..write: auth != null && (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/meta/hostUid').val() === auth.uid || (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/meta/status').val() === 'lobby' && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/memberUids/' + auth.uid).val() === true))

songBank..write: auth != null && (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/meta/hostUid').val() === auth.uid || (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/meta/status').val() === 'lobby' && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/memberUids/' + auth.uid).val() === true))

game..write: auth != null && root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/meta/status').val() !== 'closed' && (root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/meta/hostUid').val() === auth.uid || root.child('rooms/' + $roomId + '/players/' + data.child('turnPlayerId').val() + '/uid').val() === auth.uid)
